title: Portuguese Nut Fritters
description: Crispy on the outside, soft on the inside, these traditional portuguese fritters are a perfect indulgence.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a large bowl, whisk together ground almonds, flour, confectioners' sugar, baking powder, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg, milk, and a pinch of salt.
Add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients and mix until just combined.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the mixture into the hot oil.
Fry for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Using a slotted spoon, remove the fritters from the oil and place them on a paper towel-lined plate.
Drain excess oil and serve warm.
